task_objective: Replace gameplay lifecycle polling with Steam app lifetime notifications while preserving auto-sync notification gating.
design_decisions: Use SteamClient.GameSessions.RegisterForAppLifetimeNotifications as the primary lifecycle source.
Keep Router.MainRunningApp polling as a fallback only when the lifetime API is unavailable.
Track active app sessions by nInstanceID so exit notifications can resolve after Router state changes.
Treat unAppID as optional because Decky documents that non-Steam shortcuts may report 0.
Preserve existing backend RPCs and auto-sync toast gating.
results: Confirmed red tests failed before implementation.
Validated frontend static tests passed after implementation.
Validated Ruff, Ruff format, ty, full pytest, TypeScript typecheck, and git diff whitespace checks passed.
